title: Create e-commerce website for Sells For You

requirements.text: Create a product catalog page that displays products with name, description, price, and image
acceptanceCriteria: Products are displayed in a grid layout
Each product shows name, description, price, and image
Product data is stored and retrieved from the backend

requirements.text: Implement backend storage for products with fields: id, name, description, price, and image filename
acceptanceCriteria: Backend can store and retrieve product information
Products persist across canister upgrades
Backend provides methods to list all products

requirements.text: Create shopping cart functionality allowing users to add products, update quantities, and remove items
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add products to cart with quantity selection
Cart displays all added items with subtotals
Users can update quantities or remove items from cart
Cart shows total price

requirements.text: Integrate Internet Identity authentication for user login and secure checkout
acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate using Internet Identity
Checkout process requires authentication
Authenticated users can view their order history

requirements.text: Create a checkout flow that captures order details and stores completed orders
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout displays cart summary and total
Users can complete purchase after authentication
Orders are stored with user identity, items, and timestamp
Users receive confirmation after successful purchase

requirements.text: Design a professional, modern visual theme with a cohesive color palette, clean typography, and polished layout that conveys trust and quality for an e-commerce platform
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent visual style applied across all pages
Professional color scheme appropriate for e-commerce
Clear typography hierarchy for product information
Clean, spacious layout that highlights products effectively

requirements.text: Render generated product placeholder images and hero banner as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Images are referenced correctly in product listings and hero section
Images load properly on the frontend

constraints: Use Internet Identity for authentication only
All backend logic must be in a single Motoko actor
Frontend must use React, Tailwind CSS, and React Query

required: Professional hero banner showing e-commerce/online shopping theme with modern gradient background (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png)
Generic product placeholder image with box/package icon on neutral background (product-placeholder-1.dim_400x400.png)
Generic product placeholder image with different package design on neutral background (product-placeholder-2.dim_400x400.png)
Generic product placeholder image with another package variant on neutral background (product-placeholder-3.dim_400x400.png)
